titan.description: Configuration for the Titan orchestrator agent

prompt.description: Custom system prompt to replace the default Titan prompt

children.description: Child agent configurations. Each child is a faster but more limited agent that Titan delegates work to.

model.description: Model ID for this child agent (provider/model format)

speed.description: Relative speed of this agent (1=slowest, 10=fastest). Used by Titan to prioritize dispatch.

intelligence.description: Reasoning capability of this agent (1=limited, 10=strong). Used by Titan to match task complexity.

modelType.description: Model architecture type. 'dense' = slower but better at logic and complex reasoning. 'sparse' = faster, better at information gathering and broad search.

maxInstances.description: Maximum number of parallel instances Titan may run for this child. Since instances share the same model (already loaded in the provider's VRAM), they can run concurrently on the same provider. Defaults to 1.

displayName.description: Human-readable display name for this child agent

provider.description: Provider identifier for this child agent. Titan will not dispatch parallel tasks to children sharing the same provider.

disabled_tools.description: Tool names to disable completely. Disabled tools are not registered with OpenCode.

maxSessionsPerAgent.description: Maximum concurrent background sessions per child agent

title: opencode-distributed-delegation
description: Configuration schema for opencode-distributed-delegation plugin — Titan orchestrator with parallel child agents
